Change Order Number: CHANGE ORDER SUMMARY BY CSI DIVISION
GC View (All Divisions) - Shows all change orders across all divisions
Subcontractor View (Division 01) - General Requirements changes only
Subcontractor View (Division 02) - Existing Conditions changes only
Subcontractor View (Division 07) - Thermal/Moisture Protection changes only
Subcontractor View (Division 21) - Fire Suppression changes only
Subcontractor View (Division 32) - Exterior Improvements changes only
2. Select appropriate CSI Division and Code for each change order
4. Get written approval before performing changed work
5. Track status: Pending / Approved / Rejected / Completed
6. Use View Mode to filter by trade (GC sees all
7. Attach all COs to original contract file
- CSI Division: Two-digit division number (01-49) for change classification
- CSI Code: Specific work category code affected by the change
- Division Name: Standard MasterFormat division name
- Division Summary: Track change order impact by trade
- View Mode: Filter data for GC (all divisions) or Subcontractor (specific trade)
